metadata.title: E2E Test - Complete Training Session Journey

story.iWant: comprehensive E2E test covering the full training session flow
story.soThat: I can confidently deploy knowing the core training experience works end-to-end

tasks.task: Implement shared assessment completion helper (from assessment-flow.spec.ts patterns)
Test training session shell renders with "Start Training" button
Test ConfidencePromptBefore modal appears and can be dismissed by selection
Complete 6 drills (2 of each type: number_line, spatial_rotation, math_operations)
Verify progress bar updates after each drill
Test ConfidencePromptAfter modal appears after final drill
Verify session completion summary displays with stats
Add error scenarios: pause/resume, end session early

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Test completes assessment (reuse assessment flow, fast-forward through questions)
Test navigates to /training and verifies training session shell renders with "Start Training" button
Test clicks "Start Training" and verifies ConfidencePromptBefore modal appears
Test selects confidence level (😊 "Pretty good") and verifies first drill renders
Test completes 6 drills (2 of each type: number_line, spatial_rotation, math_operations)
Test verifies progress bar updates after each drill (e.g., "Drill 3 of 6")
Test verifies ConfidencePromptAfter modal appears after final drill
Test selects confidence level and verifies session completion summary shows stats
Test verifies IndexedDB contains: Session record, 6 drill_results, telemetry_logs
Test clicks "View Progress" and verifies navigation to /progress
Test includes error scenarios: pause/resume, end session early
Test takes screenshots at: Session start, Mid-session, Confidence prompt, Completion
Test passes on Chromium, Firefox, WebKit

docs.doc: Epic 3 Technical Specification - Training drill flow, data models, APIs
Architecture specification with E2E testing philosophy

code.file: Assessment E2E test with reusable patterns: - IndexedDB clearing: await page.evaluate(() => indexedDB.deleteDatabase('DiscalculasDB')) - Step-by-step assessment completion - Screenshots at key points - Wait for results summary pattern

Training drill E2E tests with patterns: - Quick assessment completion loop - Drill type detection (number_line, spatial_rotation) - Drill interaction patterns (mouse.click for number line, button click for spatial) - Feedback verification - IndexedDB drill_results verification

Main training session orchestrator with: - handleStartTraining() - Starts session, shows ConfidencePromptBefore - handleDrillComplete() - Shows feedback, advances to next drill - handleConfidenceBeforeSelect() / handleConfidenceAfterSelect() - Confidence modal handlers - handlePauseResume() / handlePauseEndSession() - Pause functionality - data-testid="start-training-button" for locator
Pre-session confidence modal with: - data-testid="confidence-before-{1-5}" for locators - 5 emoji options (1-5 scale) - Dialog prevents outside clicks and ESC dismiss
Post-session confidence modal (similar pattern to ConfidencePromptBefore)
Session completion summary with: - data-testid="drills-completed", "accuracy", "confidence-change" - data-testid="view-progress-button", "done-button" - Shows confetti for positive confidence change
Number line drill with: - role="slider" for marker interaction - h2 with "Where is X?" prompt - Submit button pattern - Feedback display (Correct!/Try again)
Spatial rotation drill with: - h2 with "Are these the same shape?" prompt - Yes/No answer buttons - Keyboard shortcuts (1/Y for Yes, 2/N for No)
Math operations drill with: - Keypad for answer input - Submit button for answer confirmation
Progress bar showing drill progression (e.g., "Drill 3 of 6")
Pause functionality with resume and end session options
Dexie database with tables: - sessions: Training session records - drill_results: Individual drill performance - telemetry_logs: Event telemetry Database name: 'DiscalculasDB'
TypeScript interfaces for: - Session, DrillResult, TelemetryLog - Field definitions and types

constraints.constraint: Test must complete in <60 seconds (Playwright timeout: 30s)
IndexedDB verification uses native indexedDB API (not Dexie) in page.evaluate()
Test should be deterministic (avoid timing-dependent assertions)

interface.name: IndexedDB Query Pattern
Assessment Completion Helper Pattern
Drill Interaction Patterns

standards.standard: Follow AAA pattern (Arrange/Act/Assert) with section comments
Use data-testid attributes for element selection when available
Include screenshots at key points for debugging
Use page.waitForTimeout() sparingly, prefer explicit waits
Verify UI state before and after interactions
Test should be deterministic and pass on first run

ideas.idea: Create completeAssessment() shared helper function to reduce duplication
Test full 6-drill flow with 2 of each drill type
Verify IndexedDB contains correct records after session completion
Test end session early saves partial data
Test confidence prompts cannot be dismissed without selection
Test keyboard navigation for drill interactions

architecturalDecisions.decision: Telemetry uses localStorage backup for resilience
Session completion uses Dexie transactions for atomic updates
Old sessions auto-cleaned after 365 days retention

patterns.pattern: Use db.transaction() for atomic multi-table updates
Use page.evaluate() with native IndexedDB API for E2E verification
